title: Online Newsletter | Kevin Bonavia MP
meta_description: Sign up for my Online Newsletter | Kevin Bonavia MP
headings: h2: Sign up to my monthly online newsletter
text_excerpt: --> Online Newsletter | Kevin Bonavia MP top of page Introduction Personal Promises Online Newsletter Stay in touch Upcoming Events Campaigns Latest News Parliament Access help all year round More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Sign up to my monthly online newsletter I made a promise to maintain regular contact with residents. You can now sign up to get monthly updates in your inbox about what I’m doing as your MP. My monthly newsletter includes information about local events, ways to get in touch with me, my stance on important issues and updates on my work in Parliament. Join the 1000 plus residents who are already receiving updates from me today by clicking the button and signing up! SIGN UP HERE Editions already published May 2026 Edition April 2026 Edition February 2026 Edition Read previous editions Monthly Online Newsletter Archive © 2024 Promoted By Tom Plater on behalf of Kevin Bonavia MP both at Ground floor right Osprey house, Primett Road, Stevenage, SG1 3EE My Privacy Policy My Acceptable Behaviour Policy bottom of page
